final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for "RAN QIU" with an autumnal, poetic, and serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (East Asian aesthetic) meets minimalist, natural-poetic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space; shallow depth-of-field treatment
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand mark as focal element, paired with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact scene framing is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a "金色时光" (golden hour) warm and healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a natural, organic surface treatment — exact texture and grain are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve brand tonal qualities: warm, minimal, poetic, serene; sufficient negative space must be maintained
Avoid:
